title: Felix's Fakemon
description: A resource pack and data pack for Cobblemon that adds 4 goobers to the game
body:
This adds 4 goobers to your cobblemon world with dex entries!


1. Felix, a ice and steel type found rarely in plains biomes.
2. Shiny, a grass and psychic type also found rarely in plains biomes.
3. Tommy, a electric and poison type found ultra-rarely in plains biomes.
4. Charlie a ground and rock type also found rarely in plains biomes.

This is my first time making fakemon so there may be a lot of bugs :D

(also if you want to spawn shiny in with cheats his name is spelt "shinie" because of game logic)


how to install
1. download the resource pack.
2. **copy** the resource pack into your world's "DATAPACK" folder
3. turn on the resource pack and it should work


**also it may be placed in your "MODS" folder so cut it out the said mods folder, place it in resource packs, then your world's datapack folder!
